unexpected_error_generic: An unexpected server error occurred. Please try again.
network_error_generic: Unable to reach the server. Please check your connection and try again.
session_expired_message: Your session has expired. Sign in again to continue.
remember_me_hint: Keeps local sign-in active for 30 days. Do not use this on shared devices.
remember_me_local_only: Remember me is available for local accounts only.
login_session_expired_hint: Your session has expired. Sign in again to continue where you left off.
login_too_many_attempts: Too many login attempts. Please try again in a minute.
login_intro: Secure, fast file access across local and remote mounts.
login_subtitle: Choose a connection mode and continue.
login_mode_ftp_hint: FTP/SFTP uses the username and password above. Private network hosts may require administrator allowlisting.
login_remote_host_hint: Use a hostname or IP address without protocol.
login_remote_test_hint: The test validates host policy, port reachability, and credentials before login.
login_remote_test_failed: Could not reach the test endpoint. Check your network and try again.
login_remote_success: Connection successful. You can now log in.
login_remote_select_protocol: Select FTP or SFTP before testing the connection.
login_remote_required: Remote host, username and password are required.
login_remote_host_not_allowed: This host is not on the remote host allowlist. Ask an administrator to allow the hostname or IP address.
login_remote_private_host: This host resolves to a private or reserved address. Administrators must explicitly allow private network targets.
login_remote_rejected: The server was reached, but the username or password was rejected.
login_remote_connect_failed: Could not connect to the remote server. Check the host, port, protocol, and firewall rules.
login_two_factor_hint: Enter the code from your authenticator app.
quick_admin_desc: For full settings, logs, and system tools, use the admin console.
command_requires_selection: Select one or more items first.
